name: Second Chances/Sc Med Trnsprt
principals: Adelia Butler (Owner); husband-and-wife team per site testimonials
districts_or_customers: Individual NEMT clients in Richmond, Fairfield, Concord CA; no school district contracts identified
recent_news: Holds SBA EDWOSB and 8(a) certifications as economically disadvantaged women-owned small business
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator; pure NEMT micro-business with no school contracts. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Alexandria Limo Inc
districts_or_customers: No school district customers identified; limousine/airport service profile
fit_notes: Appears to be a small limo/car service in Glenview IL, not a school-bus or SPED contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Elite Trans United Inc
fleet_size_est: small (Mercedes Sprinter vans, ADA wheelchair ramp equipped)
districts_or_customers: Generic 'school transport' marketing; no specific district contracts identified
recent_news: Minority-owned business; ~$558K revenue per D&B; partnered with Kings Royal Coach for luxury overflow
fit_notes: Primarily NEMT with some ad-hoc school transport for individuals; not a district contractor or yellow-bus operator. Too small and wrong service mix to be a Summit tuck-in.

name: Professional Transportation
principals: Part of United Companies; Country Club Hills address is local field office, not HQ
districts_or_customers: Class I railroads: CSXT, KCS, Norfolk Southern, Union Pacific, Amtrak, BNSF, Canadian Pacific, Utah Railway, Portland & Western
recent_news: Established 1980 as crew transport for Class I railroads; not a school bus operator
fit_notes: NOT a student transportation operator. This is PTI, the national railroad crew transport business owned by United Companies. The Country Club Hills IL listing is a local field office. Disqualified as a Summit tuck-in target.

name: RTC Transportation Corp
districts_or_customers: Commercial shippers; no school district customers
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus operator. RTC is a freight/logistics carrier (truckload, intermodal, warehousing) headquartered in Mount Laurel NJ. Disqualified as a Summit tuck-in target.
